description:
Rename all existing BUCK files to rules.star.

Files to rename (~33):
- cmd/*/BUCK
- go/pkg/*/BUCK
- python/*/BUCK
- rust/*/BUCK
- examples/*/BUCK
- e2e/fixtures/*/BUCK
- templates/default/BUCK
- testdata/BUCK

Command: find . -name BUCK -not -path './buck-out/*' -exec sh -c 'mv "$1" "$(dirname $1)/rules.star"' _ {} \;
title: Rename all BUCK files to rules.star in repo
